global_description: Medium-sized marsupial with a long, prehensile tail, pointed snout, and large ears. Its fur is typically gray or brown, with a lighter underside. The body is rounded, and it has sharp claws for climbing.

part_details.head: Pointed snout with large ears and dark eyes
part_details.body: Rounded with gray or brown fur, lighter underside

spatial_relations: Head at front with snout and ears
